required_subjects.subject: FOR APPLICANTS WHO ARE EMPLOYED IN A LAW ENFORCEMENT DEPARTMENT: A Senior Certificate or a National Senior Certificate with a bachelor's degree or a diploma endorsement
and a relevant NQF Level 5 or 6 qualification in the law enforcement environment
Applicants are also required to have at least five (5) years of confirmed working experience as a law enforcement official
Proof of employment (in the form of an official letter from the HR division of the department) should be submitted with the application
